channel.title: Experience on Om Arora
channel.description: Recent content in Experience on Om Arora

item.title: My First Hackathon — Where Ideas Turned Into Reality
item.description: Reflections from my first hackathon experience and how it changed how I think about building things.

item.title: BeCon 2026 — Notes from a Weekend That Stayed With Me
item.description: Reflections written two weeks after attending BeCon 2026 at IIT Delhi.

item.title: IITBMO 2026 — A Day of Quiet, Problems, and Perspective
item.description: Reflections from participating in the IIT Bombay Mathematics Olympiad 2026.
